original_image_tags: A handwritten letter on lined blue-ruled paper, written in blue ink. The paper shows some minor smudges and age spots. There are stamped and handwritten notations at the bottom.

elements.description: A page of handwritten cursive text on lined paper, with several handwritten annotations, signatures, and stamps in blue and red ink. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or other graphical visual elements are present.
